query:
SELECT b.id as "id!: String"
           FROM blocks b
           JOIN block_properties bp_tpl
               ON bp_tpl.block_id = b.id
              AND bp_tpl.key = 'template'
              AND bp_tpl.value_text = 'true'
           WHERE b.block_type = 'page'
             AND b.deleted_at IS NULL
             AND b.space_id = ?1
